attacking_style: Participates in early solo or small group breaks, typically more for team tactical purposes than personal victory. Not an explosive attacker on climbs alone.
team_tactics: Deployed as high-value domestique for pacemaking and controlling breakaways. Willing to sacrifice personal result to weaken rival teams through tempo work.
terrain_preference: Stage race mountain stages where sustained tempo matters more than explosive power. Exposed on gravel/technical courses requiring specialized positioning skills beyond pure climbing.
vulnerability: Lacks gravel-specific positioning and technical handling skills. Pure climbing strength insufficient when terrain demands tactical placement before key sectors. Gets caught in breakaways on specialist courses.
key_patterns: Used in solo breakaways for peloton calibration and time management (2 instances)
Sacrificial domestique role: pacemaking to deplete rival teams even when dropped himself (2 instances)
Caught before critical course features when positioning skills required beyond climbing (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 shows continued use in tactical breakaway role, suggesting consistent domestique value but no evolution toward protected status
